key_insights.insight: True confidence is the quiet, internal honesty to acknowledge struggles and persevere.
key_insights.quote: Confidence is the quiet stuff and the honesty and to say this is a struggle, but let's go.

key_insights.insight: Striving to do your best is more sustainable than aiming to be the best.
key_insights.quote: I think the thing of do your best you know it's dib dib dib you knowdyv do your best I love that because wherever you're at you can do that.

key_insights.insight: The most valuable things in life are the relationships we build.
key_insights.quote: The wealth of life the wealth is always found in our relationships and and you know you come across people who are rich in friendships and you know rich in passion and love what they do and love the people they work with and you know and that's enough that's wonderful

key_insights.insight: Heroes are often those who work tirelessly behind the scenes, not always the ones in the spotlight.
key_insights.quote: As I get older I see more and more heroes left right and send we're more left and right rather than center you know and I love that I sort of see it in people.

key_insights.insight: Acknowledging mistakes and imperfections makes content more relatable and engaging.
key_insights.quote: The magic at that time it was the first show that came along that let all the mud be on the lens and the rain on the lens and the trips and the stumbles you saw the cameraman's hand and it would come there was asort of interactivity that was thatwas great

key_insights.insight: Resilience, determination, and the ability to perform under pressure are the most valuable traits.
key_insights.quote: The weapons that serve me best and the weapons are always this you know be dogged be determined be the most resilient person out there when it's hard you know come alive in the big moments.

key_insights.insight: Imposter syndrome can grow even as success increases, especially when surrounded by highly skilled individuals.
key_insights.quote: I think as the years have gone on, I've realized actually I've often been surrounded by people who are better climbers,better skydivers, better survival guys, better looking, fitter, stronger, all of these things.

actionable_advice.advice: Focus on doing your best, not being the best, in any endeavor.
actionable_advice.how_to: Set realistic goals, acknowledge limitations, and celebrate progress, focusing on personal growth rather than external comparison.

actionable_advice.advice: Cultivate meaningful relationships with the people around you.
actionable_advice.how_to: Prioritize genuine connections, express gratitude, and offer support to colleagues, friends, and family.

actionable_advice.advice: When facing challenges, focus on resilience and determination.
actionable_advice.how_to: Develop a strategy for overcoming obstacles, maintain a positive attitude, and seek support when needed.

memorable_stories: The story of his wife encouraging him to try the initial TV show, despite his reservations.
His description of the camera crew as being 'true heroes' and his pride in their long-lasting friendships.
contrarian_claims: That overt, external expressions of self-assurance are not necessarily indicative of true confidence.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 80 - Bear Grylls: The Trick I Use To Find Confidence
